item.title: Japan Boosts Defense Tech Spending in Indo-Pacific Shift
item.author: Jane Analyst
item.description: Tokyo announced new investments in defense technology amid regional tensions.
item.content:encoded: Tokyo announced new investments in defense technology amid regional tensions in the Indo-Pacific.

item.title: Fed Holds Rates Steady as Wall Street Awaits Signals
item.description: The Federal Reserve kept interest rates unchanged in Washington.
